Error: The value of the constant A has a cyclic dependency via B.
   ╭─[input.sol:4:1]
   │
 4 │ uint256 constant A = B;
   │ ───────────┬───────────

───╯

Error: The value of the constant B has a cyclic dependency via A.
   ╭─[input.sol:5:1]
   │
 5 │ uint256 constant B = A;
   │ ───────────┬───────────  
   │            ╰───────────── Error occurred here.
